nodes.name: Firecrawl: scrape announcements
nodes.notes: Credential = Header Auth account (your Firecrawl key: Authorization = Bearer fc-...). Retries 3x on transient errors.

nodes.name: Gemini: extract data centers
nodes.notes: Credential = Google Gemini(PaLM) Api account (your existing one). The key is appended automatically; do not add it to the URL. Retries 3x on transient 503s.

nodes.name: Get county centroids
nodes.notes: Replace JimGoff518 with your GitHub username/org. No auth needed for a public repo; if private, add the same GitHub Header Auth credential.

nodes.name: Get existing facilities
nodes.notes: Credential = GitHub account (your existing GitHub API credential). All 5 GitHub nodes use it.

nodes.name: GitHub: create branch
nodes.notes: Continue on error: if the branch already exists (422), proceed to commit into it instead of failing the run.

nodes.name: GitHub: commit file
nodes.notes: Continue on error: if the file already exists on the branch from a prior run (422 'sha wasn't supplied'), the content is already correct, so proceed to open the PR instead of failing.

nodes.name: GitHub: open PR
nodes.notes: Continue on error: if a PR already exists for this branch (422), don't fail the run; the review email still fires.

parameters.subject: =Review new data-center pin: {{ $('Build facility files').item.json.facility.name }}
=Data center needs a map location: {{ $json.facility.name }}
